# UPDATE: Pony AI Deep Dive

**From:** The AV Market Strategist <avmarketstrategist@substack.com>  
**Date:** 2026-06-05T09:37:44.000Z

---

👋 Hey everyone,
Pony.ai reported Q1 2026 on May 26. The numbers moved enough that I went back into the living deep dive and rebuilt every section that the new print touched.
If you have not seen these before, the deep dives are the long-form company files I keep current as a single reference for the names that will define this market. The WeRide one came first. Pony AI is the other. I update them whenever there is a material event, so paid subscribers always have one document that is actually current instead of a pile of old posts.
The weekly newsletter is free, and it always will be. The deep dives are my way of saying thank you to the readers who chose to support it with a paid subscription even though they never had to.
What I updated in the deep dive:
- A new Q1 2026 financials section with the full segment breakdown, margin, losses, and cash
- Raised 2026 targets throughout: fleet from 3,000 to over 3,500 vehicles, robotaxi revenue from triple to more than 3.5x of 2025
- Robotaxi fleet updated 
- New visuals in the fleet growth and quarterly revenue section
- Guangzhou expansion into the Haizhu core (Canton Tower, Pazhou)
- Joint deployment model now generating its first revenue
- ADC shipments, and the segment rename to Intelligent Solutions
- Updated bull case, bear case, and what to watch into Q2
The full updated deep dive is for paid subscribers. If you are on the free list, this is exactly the kind of work your subscription funds. You get every living deep dive kept current, the full financial breakdowns, and the analysis. 
If you already support this newsletter, thank you. The updated file is live now.
Thanks for reading.

---
